title: Automation Duplication Subitem Level
excerpt: I have an automation I wish I could make. Where it says item, I wish it was subitem as I only want one subitem to be moved to a specific group. Does anyone know a workaround to be able to do this function on a subitem…

posts.author: Avery (Avery Romine)
posts.cookedHtml:
image1204×435 16.7 KB

I have an automation I wish I could make. Where it says item, I wish it was subitem as I only want one subitem to be moved to a specific group. Does anyone know a workaround to be able to do this function on a subitem level?

posts.author: JHconsultancy (Joseph Honig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

You can do this using Make.com feel free to reach out to me and I’ll guide you on how to do it.

posts.author: jparty (Javier Party)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is a much wanted functionality. To be able to:

  • duplicate a subitem
  • move a subitem to another item
  • modify the duplicated subitem

At the moment, you can create a subitem, but not programmatically. If it was possible to assign values from the triggering subitem to the newly created one, we could use this as a workaround to duplication.
